title: checked_mul for number literal overflow detection is correct
description: lexer.rs:206-210: Uses checked_mul to detect overflow when applying K/M/G multipliers to number literals. A reviewer might suggest 'as u64' or saturating_mul; both are wrong here. checked_mul correctly surfaces malformed scripts (a 20-digit number with K suffix should fail, not silently saturate). This is the right approach for a parse-time operation at a system boundary.
